form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (18.78) at Q Straight over 350m. Boxed on well last time to hit the frame. Rates highly again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (18.78) at Q Straight over 350m. Boxed on well last time to hit the frame. Rates highly again.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion before missing the frame last time out, finishing fifth (19.85) at Q Lakeside. Drawn a inside box but will need the right run to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been racing in honest fashion before missing the frame last time out, finishing fifth (19.85) at Q Lakeside. Drawn a inside box but will need the right run to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked at the first turn shortly after became unbalanced and lost ground.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.5 lengths second at Q Straight but did record a brilliant 18.72 over the 350m journey. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.5 lengths second at Q Straight but did record a brilliant 18.72 over the 350m journey. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a OPEN at this track when a 5 length third but did run a hot 19.74 for the 366m trip. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time in a OPEN at this track when a 5 length third but did run a hot 19.74 for the 366m trip. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 4th over 407m at Rockhampton beaten 5 lengths (24.27) behind Raptor Girl in a Grade 5 on April 12. Solid showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last start finished 4th over 407m at Rockhampton beaten 5 lengths (24.27) behind Raptor Girl in a Grade 5 on April 12. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd on April 16 over 520m at Q Parklands behind Kingsbrae Brett beaten 3 lengths (30.17) in a Mix 5. Has clocked an outstanding 19.55 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.
